file_migrations.migration_notes: Successfully migrated all Agent queries to MCPAgentJob. Key changes: (1) Removed Agent imports from 3 locations. (2) Replaced COUNT queries with MCPAgentJob.job_id. (3) Updated active_agents query to use status.in_(['waiting', 'working']). (4) Migrated get_agent_statistics endpoint to iterate MCPAgentJob with full field mapping. (5) Added status mapping for legacy API compatibility (active→waiting/working, idle→waiting, working→working, decommissioned→decommissioned). (6) Migrated task count extraction to use job_metadata JSONB field. No API contract changes - all response fields maintained compatibility.
